title: Dinosaur Era
editorialSummary: Dinosaurs and prehistoric creatures sorted by geological period: Triassic, Jurassic, Cretaceous, and Paleogene (post-dinosaur megafauna). False trail: Many players think all dinosaurs lived at the same time; T. Rex (Cretaceous) never met Stegosaurus (Jurassic).

meta.gptRationale: The era categories are familiar, but some creatures are less well-known and the Paleogene group introduces a deliberate curveball.
